---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What is frustrating, missing, or awkward today?

## Proposed Idea

What would you like Loren to do instead?

## Why It Helps

Explain the user benefit or workflow improvement.

## Extra Context

Mockups, examples, and terminal screenshots are welcome.
